Flamesong  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WIS: +6
Effect: Flamesong (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 45
WT: 2.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: RNG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 18 2003 at 1:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I keep hearing the phrase "it looks like a" or it don't look very good.. It sure goes to show ya how utterly retarded some sorry ******'s in this "game" think. Simply amazing at how moronic some people are ..worried about how it looks...maybe you should be more worried about how well it works. Dumbasses..

QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2003 at 8:54 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788009928
83 posts
The graphic of this sword looks just like the pic in the corner of the item box above. Very thin and kinda wimpy. If it looked cooler I'd have kept it, resold for 275pp & made a small 25pp profit.

Edited, Sun Apr 13 13:10:03 2003
▲ Page top
Wipeout at Gleed Dragonhunter
QuoteReply
# Oct 21 2002 at 8:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1603066958094
210 posts
OK have to post this as none of the Gleed Dragonhunter killers ever posted this.

We went to go kill Gleed and had a 3 group raid force that was there to do Plate cycle since KD was uncamped except for us at the time we desided to go kill Gleed and grab his bow - It was no problem getting thru to him at all. Killed all the easy giants on the way without a hicup and cleared a few by the see invis line.

Walked the shelf with the dogs on the right side drop off and then killed the 3 blue guards in the way and the undercon green guard jus in front of Gleed. When we pulled Dragonhunter - sure enough we weren't able to split him and his dog - no problem - we had 3 full groups 2 mobs = no problem.

THEN about 1 minute into the fight EVERY DOG from that island rushed us. I mean they WERE WAY WAY WAY out of our aggro area. I mean it was as if getting off of Orc lift in Gfay aggroed the orcs from Orc hill down to Kelethin. That is how far we were from the dogs. regardless - 4 to 5 dogs showed up from no where and wiped us out - only one group got off an evac.

The bottom line is either:
- someone trained us: didn't happen - I happened to be meleeing facing the archway and saw all of the dogs arrive and start smoking folks -sitters first. I saw no rogue element leading them and they are hardly from a main pathway.
- there is a relation ship between his dogs and that pack of dogs in that kennel island thing.
- this could be a new scripted event (doubtful) - but it is surprising NO ONE reported this before.

If you have never killed him before be carefull here. It might behoove your force to wipe the dogs out on your way to prevent the surprise we received.

Serano
▲ Page top
RE: Wipeout at Gleed Dragonhunter
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2003 at 7:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752637524
7 posts
Just killed him the other day and he dropped Flamesong. He dog tagged along but no other dogs did.
▲ Page top

# Oct 12 2003 at 11:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785147387

27 posts
Im not quite sure, but in the Bow Quest he mentions that he trains the dogs, perhaps it is an event that he calls the dogs that he "trained" to his aid. dont trust me tho, just a thought that i had

Not bad weapon. 75dd proc, gets resisted at times. Ok ratio. Got a Velium Swiftblade with it. Ok look. Id rather use my Wyrmslayer. Or once I hit lvl 50 VSB with the steel hilt flint dagger 5 28 625dd proc. I wonder how the VSB would work with our epic swiftwind?

I got one of these the other day off of Gleed, by tho Nobles area in Kael, Gleed also drops Bow of the Huntsman... nice bow..

#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 18 2001 at 4:43 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i am on drinal and i really want on of those baby i trade a IBC + some pp for it. post here or give me a call for that i am ready
Where he is
QuoteReply
# May 27 2001 at 5:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591759190429
2 posts
As you walk past the bank, you can go right to the arena and left through a few arches to where this guy pops. We usually take 3 groups 54-60 up here and the guy is pretty easy. the mobs around him also drop quest armor for thurd. Its a great spot to camp with a solid party.

Eonwe
Heroic Few

all I can say is... DAYUM
QuoteReply
# Apr 09 2001 at 2:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
carry this with a frostbringer... and omg...

both weapons are fairly fast, and hit very hard... mix this w/ call of sky, and you wind up getting proc's near constantly... if it isn't a 35dd proc plus knockback, it'll be a 60dd w/ an ac debuff... or a 75dd proc... my gawd, they dropped some nice stuff in kael. and yes, other melee classes would benefit just as well from these two weapons

quisenart wannabe on saryn
ranger of the 43rd season

# Mar 13 2001 at 4:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750549302
2 posts
gleed spawns up the ramp towards king tormax in the area where the wolves are. he is lvl 56 and has a 56 wolf with him. took him down tonight with 2 grps of 50+ but dog was killing us off as we did so. would suggest 3 grps 50+ or 2 grps 55+ to take him and the dog.
